name: music-assistant-client
documentation:
# Music Assistant Client

Python client to interact with the Music Assistant Server API

modules.name: music_assistant_client.constants
documentation: Constants for the Music Assistant client.

modules.name: music_assistant_client.helpers
documentation: Several generic/basic helpers and utilities complementing the Music Assistant Client.

documentation: Return compacted MediaItem dict.

functions.name: music_assistant_client.helpers.searchresults_as_compact_dict
documentation: Return compacted search result dict.

functions.name: music_assistant_client.helpers.get_serializable_value
documentation: Parse the value to its serializable equivalent.

functions.name: music_assistant_client.helpers.serialize_to_json
documentation: Serialize a value (or a list of values) to json.

functions.name: music_assistant_client.helpers.json_dumps
documentation: Dump json string.

documentation: Client-specific Exceptions for Music Assistant.

documentation: Generic MusicAssistant exception.

documentation: Initialize a transport error.

classes.name: music_assistant_client.exceptions.ConnectionClosed
documentation: Exception raised when the connection is closed.

classes.name: music_assistant_client.exceptions.ConnectionFailed

documentation: Initialize a connection failed error.
Exception raised when an established connection fails.

classes.name: music_assistant_client.exceptions.NotConnected
documentation: Exception raised when not connected to client.

classes.name: music_assistant_client.exceptions.InvalidState
documentation: Exception raised when data gets in invalid state.

classes.name: music_assistant_client.exceptions.InvalidMessage
documentation: Exception raised when an invalid message is received.

classes.name: music_assistant_client.exceptions.InvalidServerVersion
documentation: Exception raised when connected to server with incompatible version.

modules.name: music_assistant_client
documentation: Music Assistant Client: Manage a Music Assistant server remotely.

documentation: Handle Initialization.

documentation: Iterate over (available) players.

documentation: Return Player by ID (or None if not found).

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.__getitem__
documentation: Return Player by ID.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_stop
documentation: Send STOP command to given player (directly).
Player related endpoints/commands

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_play
documentation: Send PLAY command to given player (directly).

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_pause
documentation: Send PAUSE command to given player (directly).

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_play_pause
documentation: Send PLAY_PAUSE (toggle) command to given player (directly).

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_power
documentation: Send POWER command to given player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_volume_set
documentation: Send VOLUME SET command to given player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_volume_up
documentation: Send VOLUME UP command to given player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_volume_down
documentation: Send VOLUME DOWN command to given player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_volume_mute
documentation: Send VOLUME MUTE command to given player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_seek
documentation:
Handle SEEK command for given player (directly).

- player_id: player_id of the player to handle the command.
- position: position in seconds to seek to in the current playing item.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_next_track
documentation: Handle NEXT TRACK command for given player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_previous_track
documentation: Handle PREVIOUS TRACK command for given player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_group
documentation:
Handle GROUP command for given player.

Join/add the given player(id) to the given (leader) player/sync group.
If the target player itself is already synced to another player, this may fail.
If the player can not be synced with the given target player, this may fail.

    - player_id: player_id of the player to handle the command.
    - target_player: player_id of the syncgroup leader or group player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_ungroup
documentation:
Handle UNGROUP command for given player.

Remove the given player from any (sync)groups it currently is synced to.
If the player is not currently grouped to any other player,
this will silently be ignored.

    - player_id: player_id of the player to handle the command.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_group_many
documentation: Join given player(s) to target player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_ungroup_many
documentation: Handle UNGROUP command for all the given players.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.play_announcement
documentation: Handle playback of an announcement (url) on given player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.set_player_group_volume
documentation:
Send VOLUME_SET command to given playergroup.

Will send the new (average) volume level to group child's.
- player_id: player_id of the playergroup to handle the command.
- volume_level: volume level (0..100) to set on the player.
PlayerGroup related endpoints/commands

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_group_volume_up
documentation: Send VOLUME_UP command to given playergroup.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.player_command_group_volume_down
documentation: Send VOLUME_DOWN command to given playergroup.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players._get_players
documentation: Fetch all Players from the server.
Other endpoints/commands

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players.fetch_state
documentation: Fetch initial state once the server is connected.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.players.Players._handle_event
documentation: Handle incoming player event.
Player related endpoints/data for Music Assistant.

documentation: Initialize.

documentation: Return if we're currently connected.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.connection.WebsocketsConnection.connect
documentation: Connect to the websocket server and return the first message (server info).

methods.name: music_assistant_client.connection.WebsocketsConnection.disconnect
documentation: Disconnect the client.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.connection.WebsocketsConnection.receive_message
documentation: Receive the next message from the server (or raise on error).

methods.name: music_assistant_client.connection.WebsocketsConnection.send_message
documentation:
Send a message to the server.

Raises NotConnected if client not connected.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.connection.WebsocketsConnection.__repr__
documentation: Return the representation.
Websockets connection to a Music Assistant Server.

documentation: Handle Initialization.

documentation: Return all player queues.

documentation: Iterate over (available) PlayerQueues.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.get
documentation: Return PlayerQueue by ID (or None if not found).

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.get_player_queue_items
documentation: Get all QueueItems for given PlayerQueue.
PlayerQueue related endpoints/commands

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.get_active_queue
documentation: Return the current active/synced queue for a player.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_play
documentation: Send PLAY command to given queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_pause
documentation: Send PAUSE command to given queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_stop
documentation: Send STOP command to given queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_resume
documentation:
Handle RESUME command for given queue.

- queue_id: queue_id of the queue to handle the command.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_next
documentation: Send NEXT TRACK command to given queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_previous
documentation: Send PREVIOUS TRACK command to given queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_clear
documentation: Send CLEAR QUEUE command to given queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_move_item
documentation:
Move queue item x up/down the queue.

Parameters:
- queue_id: id of the queue to process this request.
- queue_item_id: the item_id of the queueitem that needs to be moved.
- pos_shift: move item x positions down if positive value
- pos_shift: move item x positions up if negative value
- pos_shift:  move item to top of queue as next item if 0

NOTE: Fails if the given QueueItem is already playing or loaded in the buffer.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_move_up
documentation: Move given queue item one place up in the queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_move_down
documentation: Move given queue item one place down in the queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_move_next
documentation: Move given queue item as next up in the queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_delete
documentation: Delete item (by id or index) from the queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_seek
documentation:
Handle SEEK command for given queue.

Parameters:
- position: position in seconds to seek to in the current playing item.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_skip
documentation:
Handle SKIP command for given queue.

Parameters:
- seconds: number of seconds to skip in track. Use negative value to skip back.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_shuffle
documentation: Configure shuffle mode on the the queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.queue_command_repeat
documentation: Configure repeat mode on the the queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.play_index
documentation: Play item at index (or item_id) X in queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.play_media
documentation:
Play media item(s) on the given queue.

- media: Media that should be played (MediaItem(s) or uri's).
- queue_opt: Which enqueue mode to use.
- radio_mode: Enable radio mode for the given item(s).
- start_item: Optional item to start the playlist or album from.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.transfer_queue
documentation: Transfer queue to another queue.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues._get_player_queues
documentation: Fetch all PlayerQueues from the server.
Other endpoints/commands

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues.fetch_state
documentation: Fetch initial state once the server is connected.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.player_queues.PlayerQueues._handle_event
documentation: Handle incoming player(queue) event.
PlayerQueue related endpoints/data for Music Assistant.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.client.MusicAssistantClient.subscribe
documentation:
Add callback to event listeners.

Returns function to remove the listener.
: ```
  param cb_func

  callback function or coroutine

  param event_filter

  Optionally only listen for these events

  param id_filter

  Optionally only listen for these id's (player_id, queue_id, uri)
  ```

documentation: Connect to the remote Music Assistant Server.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.client.MusicAssistantClient.send_command_no_wait
documentation: Send a command without waiting for the response.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.client.MusicAssistantClient.start_listening
documentation: Connect (if needed) and start listening to incoming messages from the server.

documentation: Disconnect the client and cleanup.

Handle incoming message.

modules.name: music_assistant_client.config
documentation: Handle Config related endpoints for Music Assistant.

classes.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config

methods.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config.__init__
documentation: Handle Initialization.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config.get_provider_configs
documentation: Return all known provider configurations, optionally filtered by ProviderType.

documentation: Return (full) configuration for a single provider.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config.get_provider_config_value
documentation: Return single configentry value for a provider.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config.get_provider_config_entries
documentation:
Return Config entries to setup/configure a provider.

provider_domain: (mandatory) domain of the provider.
instance_id: id of an existing provider instance (None for new instance setup).
action: [optional] action key called from config entries UI.
values: the (intermediate) raw values for config entries sent with the action.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config.save_provider_config
documentation:
Save Provider(instance) Config.

provider_domain: (mandatory) domain of the provider.
values: the raw values for config entries that need to be stored/updated.
instance_id: id of an existing provider instance (None for new instance setup).

documentation: Remove ProviderConfig.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config.reload_provider
documentation: Reload provider.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config.get_core_config_entries
documentation:
Return Config entries to configure a core controller.

core_controller: name of the core controller
action: [optional] action key called from config entries UI.
values: the (intermediate) raw values for config entries sent with the action.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.config.Config.save_core_config
documentation: Save CoreController Config values.
Config related endpoints/data for Music Assistant.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.music.Music.start_sync
documentation:
Start running the sync of (all or selected) musicproviders.

media_types: only sync these media types. None for all.
providers: only sync these provider instances. None for all.

methods.name: music_assistant_client.music.Music.get_running_sync_tasks

methods.name: music_assistant_client.music.Music.search
documentation:
Perform global search for media items on all providers.

```
param search_query

Search query.

param media_types

A list of media_types to include.

param limit

number of items to return in the search (per type).
```
